## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase:** 25.5-trajectory-contract-redesign
**Plans:** 6 plan(s) in 3 wave(s)
**Commit:** `0f767a4c`

### Multi-Source Coverage Audit

| Source | Items | Covered | Status |
|--------|-------|---------|--------|
| **GOAL** | Per-PHASE trajectory + runtime enforcement + pressure removal | All 3 goals | ✅ COVERED |
| **REQ** | 12 requirements (REQ-TRAJ-01→07, REQ-CONT-01→05) | All 12 in plans | ✅ COVERED |
| **RESEARCH** | 6 patterns, 6 pitfalls, 3-layer architecture | All implemented | ✅ COVERED |
| **CONTEXT** | 44 decisions (D-01→D-44) | All traced to tasks | ✅ COVERED |

**Deferred ideas NOT in plans:** Pressure module changes, phase spawn hook, delegation-persistence changes, agent profile changes, session-tracker changes, documentation updates. ✅

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Plans | Autonomous | Parallel |
|------|-------|------------|----------|
| 1 | 25.5-01, 25.5-02 | yes, yes | ✅ (no file overlap) |
| 2 | 25.5-03, 25.5-04, 25.5-05 | yes, yes, yes | ✅ (no file overlap) |
| 3 | 25.5-06 | yes | — (depends on Wave 2) |

### Plans Created

| Plan | Objective | Tasks | Files | Requirements |
|------|-----------|-------|-------|-------------|
| 25.5-01 | Trajectory types + schema (5 states, PhaseTrajectoryRecord, JumpLink) | 2 TDD | types.ts, trajectory.schema.ts, types.test.ts | REQ-TRAJ-01, 05, 07 |
| 25.5-02 | Contract types + schema (pressure removal, backward compat) | 2 TDD | types.ts, agent-work-contract.schema.ts, cross-linking.test.ts | REQ-CONT-03, 04 |
| 25.5-03 | Trajectory store ops + progressive disclosure + lifecycle | 3 (2 TDD + 1 auto) | store-operations.ts, ledger.ts, index.ts + 3 test files | REQ-TRAJ-01, 02, 04, 05, 06 |
| 25.5-04 | Contract operations + evidence gating | 2 TDD | operations.ts, lifecycle.ts, store.ts, index.ts, lifecycle.test.ts | REQ-CONT-02, 03, 04 |
| 25.5-05 | Contract enforcement hook (tool.execute.before) | 2 (1 TDD + 1 auto) | contract-enforcement.ts (NEW), tool-before-guard.ts, contract-enforcement.test.ts (NEW) | REQ-CONT-01 |
| 25.5-06 | Tool updates + system prompt injection + plugin wiring | 3 (1 TDD + 2 auto) | hivemind-trajectory.ts, hivemind-agent-work.ts, governance-block.ts, plugin.ts + 2 test files | REQ-TRAJ-03, REQ-CONT-05 |

### Decision Coverage Summary

| Decision Range | Plans | Key Decisions |
|---------------|-------|---------------|
| D-01 to D-05 (Trajectory scope) | 01, 03 | Per-PHASE, traj-phase-{N} ID, parentTrajectoryId linking |
| D-06 to D-08 (Contract enforcement) | 05 | tool.execute.before, allowedSurfaces hard block |
| D-09 to D-13 (Pressure removal) | 02, 04 | Remove all pressure from types + operations |
| D-14 (CQRS pragmatism) | All | Hooks may write to trajectory/contracts |
| D-15 to D-19 (Orchestrator-driven) | 03, 06 | Explicit tool call, not automatic |
| D-20 to D-22 (Jump links) | 01, 03 | delegation:{childSessionID} format |
| D-23 to D-26 (Hook wiring) | 05 | Hard block, specific error format |
| D-27 to D-30 (Progressive disclosure) | 03 | All 3 depth levels required |
| D-31 to D-35 (Lifecycle transitions) | 01, 03 | Auto + manual transitions |
| D-36 to D-39 (Phase spawn) | 03, 06 | Orchestrator explicit call |
| D-40 to D-42 (System prompt injection) | 06 | experimental.chat.system.transform |
| D-43 to D-44 (Backward compat) | 02, 04 | Old fields silently ignored |

### Next Steps

Execute: `/gsd-execute-phase 25.5`
